x-enumeration-literals.name: Cashback
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Direct credit or cash reward based on account activity or transactions

Comment:
$50 cashback for spending $500 on a credit card

x-enumeration-literals.name: Gift Cards / Vouchers
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Prepaid cards usable at retail stores or online platforms.

Comment:
Amazon gift card, Starbucks voucher

x-enumeration-literals.name: Merchandise / Physical Goods
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tangible items customers can receive.

Comment:
Headphones, smartwatches, bank-branded merchandise

x-enumeration-literals.name: Points / Loyalty Credits
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Program-specific points that can be redeemed or transferred to partners.

Comment:
1,000 bank points = $10 or 750 airline miles

x-enumeration-literals.name: Discounts / Rebates
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Financial reduction on banking services or partner products.

Comment:
20% discount on insurance premium, $50 rebate on account fees
